title: Generate framework-native plugin definition from SkillSpec

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to one framework-native plugin target generated from existing SkillSpec data; do not add a marketplace, new runtime semantics, or hand-authored target behavior.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Add a compact generated Codex plugin target sourced from SkillSpec, update the generator, check in generated output, and prove freshness plus behavior-preservation assertions.
canonical_core.proof_expectations: ['uv run python scripts/generate/generate_skillspec_targets.py --check', 'uv run pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py::test_skillspec_generated_startup_target_preserves_behavior_contract tests/test_contract_tooling.py::test_skillspec_generated_codex_plugin_preserves_framework_native_contract tests/test_workspace_skills_cli.py::test_generated_startup_router_skill_is_compact_adapter_projection tests/test_workspace_skills_cli.py::test_generated_codex_plugin_is_compact_framework_native_projection -q', 'uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace/contract_tooling.py scripts/generate/generate_skillspec_targets.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py tests/test_workspace_skills_cli.py']
canonical_core.completion_criteria: ['SkillSpec declares a generated plugin target contract for a framework-native Codex target.', 'The generator emits a checked-in compact plugin.json from the same SkillSpec source as generated skills.', 'Tests fail if the generated plugin omits source traceability, preferred CLI, no-CLI fallback, forbidden actions, next-safe-action semantics, or generated skill linkage.', 'The generated target remains a projection and does not become the product behavior source.']

completion_criteria: SkillSpec declares a generated plugin target contract for a framework-native Codex target.
The generator emits a checked-in compact plugin.json from the same SkillSpec source as generated skills.
Tests fail if the generated plugin omits source traceability, preferred CLI, no-CLI fallback, forbidden actions, next-safe-action semantics, or generated skill linkage.
The generated target remains a projection and does not become the product behavior source.

execution_run.what happened: Implemented the #989 framework-native plugin generation slice on the current #960 branch. SkillSpec now declares generated plugin targets, the generator emits a Codex plugin manifest at generated/workspace/plugins/codex/.codex-plugin/plugin.json, and tests prove the target preserves SkillSpec traceability, generated skill linkage, preferred CLI, no-CLI fallback, forbidden actions, and next_safe_action semantics.
